steps.title: Set up the revenue equation and substitute
steps.content:
The museum's total revenue equals \$12 per adult ticket plus \$6 per child ticket. This gives us:
$$12a + 6c = 5640$$
where $a$ = adult tickets and $c$ = child tickets. Since 260 adult tickets were sold:
$$12(260) + 6c = 5640$$
$$3120 + 6c = 5640$$

steps.title: Solve for child tickets
steps.content:
Subtract 3120 from both sides:
$$6c = 2520$$
Divide by 6:
$$c = 420$$
Therefore, 420 child admission tickets were sold.
